title: hieracium magdalenae
intro: Hieracium magdalenae, also known as Magdalena hawk's-beard, is a flowering plant species in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting digestion. Hieracium magdalenae can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions, and is often used in traditional folk medicine for its purported therapeutic properties.
